title: Admin menu
description: A powerful admin menu mod for Minecraft using NeoForge, designed to streamline server management — now in beta.
body: Admin Menu is a lightweight NeoForge mod for Minecraft that adds a basic in-game admin menu. In this early beta, running the command /adminmenu opens a simple interface where you can switch between Creative, Survival, and Spectator modes, and apply one effect. More tools and features are planned in future updates. Feedback is welcome as the mod continues to improve! <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3DTcg3CF2xU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
